videos.title: This Sales Call Review Is Uncomfortable, But It Will Make You Rich ($1M/Mo Trainer)
videos.description:
Become a Unicorn Closer ➡️ https://unicorncloser.com/?video=SuAg4adhLnw

I went from $0 to earning $100,000 a month in commissions within 17 months as a high-ticket closer.

Then, I trained Alex Hormozi’s Gym Launch Sales team, and in 8 weeks took them to their highest close rates in over a year.

Next, I helped scale multiple high-ticket offers beyond $1 Million per month in cash-collected. 

Now, I've helped 4 high-ticket closers earn $100,000 a month in commission inside my Unicorn Closer Mas
